_doc: The vault pointer. Tracked under .cursor/ so every git worktree of this clone resolves the SAME external vault. 'vault' is the vault root (supports ~). Each service has a 'mount' relative to the vault and an 'accessVia': 'path' for a local folder, or 'mcp' for remote storage (then 'vault' may be null and 'mount' is a logical id wired through your MCP config). Knowledge is the project's durable ground truth; memory is the agent's running log. 'knowledge.autonomy' tunes how freely the agent may write the KB on its own initiative: 'open' (default) — keep the KB in sync with your work without asking, surfacing only large/destructive restructurings; 'ask' — write only on request or an approved proposal; 'readonly' — never write, only report. Secrets NEVER go here. Full spec: bundles/ARCHITECTURE-v1.md and rules/harness.mdc.
